requirements.summary: Create frontend forms to add Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises with separate dialogs
acceptanceCriteria: UI provides separate controls to add Students with name input
UI provides separate controls to add Instructors with name input
UI provides separate controls to add Aircraft with registration input
UI provides separate controls to add Exercises with name/description input
Each add form validates input and calls backend create methods

file_operations.description: Create a reusable dialog component for adding Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises. The component accepts entity type as a prop and renders appropriate form fields (name for Student/Instructor, registration for Aircraft, name+description for Exercise). Includes validation and calls the corresponding backend create method (createStudent, createInstructor, createAircraft, createExercise) with generated UUID. Uses shadcn/ui Dialog, Form, Input, Button, and Label components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a custom hook to manage entity data fetching and mutations. Provides methods to fetch all Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises using backend methods (getAllStudents, getAllInstructors, getAllAircraft, getAllExercises). Includes create, update, and delete mutations for each entity type. Returns loading states and error handling. Uses React Query or similar state management pattern.

requirements.summary: Create flight log entry form with auto-populated date, dropdowns, toggles, time inputs, and auto-calculated total hours
acceptanceCriteria: Date field defaults to current date on form load
Date can be changed via calendar picker UI component
All dropdowns populate from backend data (Students, Instructors, Aircraft, Exercises)
Flight type toggle switches between Solo and Dual
Landing type toggle switches between Day and Night
Landing count accepts positive integers
Takeoff and landing time inputs accept HH:MM format
Total hours displays automatically calculated value as times are entered
Submit button calls backend to create new flight log entry

file_operations.description: Create the main flight log entry form component with all required fields. Includes date picker (defaulting to today) using shadcn/ui Calendar component, Select components for Student/Instructor/Aircraft/Exercise dropdowns populated from useEntities hook, Toggle components for Solo/Dual and Day/Night, numeric Input for landing count, time Inputs for takeoff/landing times with HH:MM validation, and a read-only display of auto-calculated total hours. Calculates total hours in real-time by parsing takeoff and landing times. On submit, calls backend createFlightLog method. Supports both create and edit modes via optional flightLog prop. Uses shadcn/ui Form, Select, Toggle, Input, Button, and Calendar components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create utility functions for time calculations. Includes parseTime (converts HH:MM string to minutes), formatTime (converts minutes to HH:MM), and calculateTotalHours (computes hours difference between takeoff and landing times, handling edge cases like flights crossing midnight). Returns Float for totalHours matching backend interface.

requirements.summary: Create table view displaying all flight log entries with Edit and Delete action buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all flight log entries retrieved from backend
Each row shows all flight log fields with resolved names (not IDs)
Edit button on each row opens form pre-populated with entry data
Delete button on each row removes the entry after confirmation
Table updates automatically after create, edit, or delete operations

file_operations.description: Create a table component displaying all flight log entries. Fetches data using useFlightLogs hook (to be created). Displays columns: Date, Student (resolved name), Instructor (resolved name), Aircraft (resolved registration), Exercise (resolved name), Flight Type, Landing Type, Landing Count, Takeoff Time, Landing Time, Total Hours. Each row includes Edit and Delete action buttons. Edit button triggers onEdit callback with entry data. Delete button shows confirmation dialog then calls backend deleteFlightLog. Uses shadcn/ui Table, Button, and AlertDialog components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a custom hook to manage flight log data. Fetches all flight logs using backend getAllFlightLogs method. Resolves foreign key references (studentId, instructorId, aircraftId, exerciseId) to display names/registrations by cross-referencing with entity data from useEntities hook. Provides create, update, and delete mutations that refresh the flight logs list. Returns resolved flight log entries with names instead of IDs, loading states, and mutation methods.

requirements.summary: Implement edit functionality to open form pre-filled with existing entry data and save changes
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button populates form with all existing entry data
All fields (date, dropdowns, toggles, times, counts) are editable
Submit in edit mode calls backend update method
Table refreshes with updated data after successful edit
Form can be cancelled to discard changes

file_operations.description: Extend FlightLogForm component to support edit mode. Accept optional flightLog prop for editing. When provided, pre-populate all form fields with existing values (date, selected IDs for dropdowns, flight type, landing type, landing count, times). In edit mode, submit calls backend updateFlightLog instead of createFlightLog. Add cancel button to close form without saving. Ensure form switches between create/edit modes seamlessly.

requirements.summary: Implement delete functionality with confirmation dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button shows confirmation dialog before deletion
Confirmed delete calls backend delete method
Table refreshes and entry is removed after successful deletion
Cancelled delete leaves entry unchanged

file_operations.description: Ensure Delete button in FlightLogTable uses shadcn/ui AlertDialog component for confirmation. On confirmation, calls deleteFlightLog mutation from useFlightLogs hook with the entry ID. On success, table automatically refreshes via the hook's refetch mechanism. On cancel, dialog closes without action. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create reporting views for student total hours and instructor reports
acceptanceCriteria: Student report displays list of all students with total hours for each
Instructor report displays list of all instructors with total hours and flight count for each
Reports call backend aggregation methods
Reports update when new flight logs are added

file_operations.description: Create a component displaying student-wise total hours report. Fetches all students using getAllStudents backend method, then for each student calls getStudentTotalHours to retrieve aggregated flight hours. Displays student name and total hours in a table or card layout. Updates automatically when flight logs change. Uses shadcn/ui Table or Card components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a component displaying instructor-wise report. Fetches all instructors using getAllInstructors backend method, then for each instructor calls getInstructorReport to retrieve total hours and flight count (returned as tuple [hours, count]). Displays instructor name, total hours, and number of flights in a table or card layout. Updates automatically when flight logs change. Uses shadcn/ui Table or Card components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a custom hook to manage report data. Provides methods to fetch student total hours and instructor reports by iterating through entities and calling backend aggregation methods (getStudentTotalHours, getInstructorReport). Returns formatted report data with loading states and error handling. Refreshes when flight log data changes.

requirements.summary: Implement Export to Excel button triggering CSV download
acceptanceCriteria: Export button is visible and accessible in UI
Clicking export calls backend CSV export method
Browser downloads CSV file with all flight log data
CSV file opens correctly in spreadsheet applications
Filename includes date or identifier (e.g., flight-logs-YYYY-MM-DD.csv)

file_operations.description: Create an Export button component that calls backend exportFlightLogsAsCSV method. On click, fetches CSV text from backend, creates a Blob, generates a download link with filename format 'flight-logs-YYYY-MM-DD.csv' (using current date), and triggers browser download. Includes loading state during export. Uses shadcn/ui Button component. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Integrate all flight log components into the main App component. Create a layout with navigation tabs or sections for: Flight Log Entry (FlightLogForm), Flight Log List (FlightLogTable), Student Report (StudentReport), Instructor Report (InstructorReport), and Export (ExportButton). Include buttons to open AddEntityDialog for Students, Instructors, Aircraft, and Exercises. Manage state for currently editing flight log and pass to FlightLogForm. Use Tailwind CSS for responsive layout and shadcn/ui Tabs component for section navigation. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add global styling for the flight logbook application. Include Tailwind base, components, and utilities layers. Add custom styles for table layouts, form spacing, and responsive design. Ensure consistent color scheme and typography throughout the application using Tailwind's utility classes and CSS variables for shadcn/ui theme colors.
